title: Widget feature code review
description: End-to-end review of all widget feature changes against the spec acceptance criteria. Check: entitlements correctness and identifier consistency across both targets; Keychain migration safety (one-time, no data loss, correct access group); timeline provider logic (5 entries, staggered dates, correct reload policy); image downsampling and memory safety; cache pruning correctness; state precedence (notConfigured > empty > offline > content); deep-link cold-start safety; WidgetCenter reload placement and kind-string accuracy; and test coverage across all five spec-mandated test groups.
acceptance_criteria: All spec acceptance criteria are met
No hardcoded hex colors or non-system fonts in widget views
Keychain credentials stored only in shared access group after migration
Image cache pruning verified to prevent unbounded growth
Deep-link cold-start path confirmed safe (no race against view initialization)
All five mandated test groups present and passing
403/HTML response correctly treated as offline, not notConfigured
